item.title: Hacking Google Search to Delete ANYTHING
item.author: Seytonic
item.content:encoded:
Get 20% off DeleteMe US consumer plans when you go to https://joindeleteme.com/seytonic and use promo code SEYTONIC at checkout. DeleteMe International Plans: https://international.joindeleteme.com/
0:00 Intro 0:17 Hacking Google to Delete ANY Search Result 3:25 DeleteMe (ad) 4:32 Flipper Zero's Car Unlocking Abilities 6:33 Legalising Offensive Hacking
Sources: https://jackpoulson.substack.com/p/dirty-tricks-reputation-management-blackman https://www.404media.co/journalist-discovers-google-vulnerability-that-allowed-people-to-disappear-specific-pages-from-search/ https://support.google.com/webmasters/thread/207032767?hl=en&msgid=209309750 https://freedom.press/issues/censorship-whac-a-mole-google-search-exploited-to-scrub-articles-on-san-francisco-tech-exec/ https://freedom.press/issues/anatomy-of-a-censorship-campaign-a-tech-execs-crusade-to-silence-a-journalist/
https://www.404media.co/inside-the-underground-trade-of-flipper-zero-tech-to-break-into-cars/ https://blog.flipper.net/can-flipper-zero-steal-your-car/
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1TCZVYPgzhg https://www.congress.gov/bill/119th-congress/house-bill/4988/text https://schweikert.house.gov/2025/08/20/schweikert-introduces-cybercrime-marque-and-reprisal-authorization-act-to-combat-foreign-scam-syndicates/
=============================================== My Website: https://www.seytonic.com/ Follow me on TWTR: https://twitter.com/seytonic Follow me on INSTA: https://www.instagram.com/jhonti/ ===============================================

item.title: McDonald’s App Bug = Unlimited Free Food
item.author: Seytonic
item.content:encoded:
0:00 Intro 0:17 McDonald’s App Bug = Unlimited Free Food 5:08 Downloading a North Korean Hacker's Computer
Sources: https://bobdahacker.com/blog/mcdonalds-security-vulnerabilities
https://phrack.org/ https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EtyzTsOtx4A https://data.ddosecrets.com/APT%20Down%20-%20The%20North%20Korea%20Files/phrack-apt-down-the-north-korea-files.pdf https://techcrunch.com/2025/08/12/hackers-breach-and-expose-a-major-north-korean-spying-operation/
